nasb.text: When they saw it, they all began to grumble, saying, “He has gone to be the guest of a man who is a sinner.”

esv.text: And when they saw it, they all grumbled, “He has gone in to be the guest of a man who is a sinner.”

cnv.text: 眾人看見就紛紛議論說：“他竟到罪人家裡去住宿！”

ccb.text: 百姓见状，都埋怨说：“祂怎么到一个罪人家里作客？”

csbs.text: 大家看见，就抱怨说：“他竟然到一个罪人家里去借宿。”
